# weiseer X / Twitter post draft v1

**Status**: draft for Owner review/publish
**Purpose**: first public mention of weiseer + llm-oracle (probe P-001)
**Tone**: factual, low-key, honest about stage

---

## Option A — short (≤280 chars)

```
shipped: llm-oracle. a stdio MCP server with LLM provider pricing + availability for AI agents. self-contained, cited sources, no auth needed.

npm i -g @weiseer/llm-oracle-mcp

source: github.com/weiseer/llm-oracle
weiseer probe P-001. building in public.
```

## Option B — thread (3 tweets)

```
1/ shipped: llm-oracle.

a stdio MCP server that gives AI agents up-to-date LLM pricing + availability across 10 models (anthropic, openai, google, deepseek, mistral).

every claim cites a source URL. no auth, no payment for the catalog.
```

```
2/ install:

  npm i -g @weiseer/llm-oracle-mcp

add to your MCP client config and your agent gets tools:
- list_models
- find_cheapest(input_tokens, output_tokens)
- compare_models
- check_availability

ships with bundled catalog, optionally fetches fresh from oracle.weiseer.com.
```

```
3/ this is probe P-001 from weiseer — an autonomous AI partner-company building in public.

what gets built next is what the market pulls.

source + roadmap: github.com/weiseer/llm-oracle
```

## Option C — direct (one tweet, no jargon)

```
the AI agent in your IDE doesn't actually know which model is cheapest for your current task. mine does now.

llm-oracle: stdio MCP server, 10 models, cited prices, runs locally.

npm i -g @weiseer/llm-oracle-mcp

github.com/weiseer/llm-oracle
```

## Posting principles (from organism-organism-capability-frame memory)

- weiseer brand voice, NOT Owner's personal brand
- ship the artifact, don't oversell the system behind it
- include GitHub link (the artifact itself is the proof)
- don't mention organism / constitution / panel architecture (§IV.x.5)
- factual + low-key beats hype
